subcodes.first_line: This Book hath been sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Almighty, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, and through it waft the sweet fragrances of Revelation and its breezes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المقتدر العلیم الحکیم و به تمر نفحات الوحی و فوحات
